expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for CSS color values
expectations.evidence: 23 hsl() uses found; only 1 hex value in file (used in icon/SVG fill, not layout color)

expectations.text: Applies at least two distinct font-weight values (heavier for value, lighter for label)
expectations.evidence: font-weight: 600 and 700 both present — metric value uses 700, label/secondary uses 600

expectations.text: The metric value uses a visibly larger font-size than the label text
expectations.evidence: Metric value: 36px, label: 13px — clear size hierarchy

expectations.text: Secondary text (label, metadata) uses a muted/lighter color distinct from primary value
expectations.evidence: Has distinct grey-scale colors for labels; grey scale variables present throughout
